entities.name: Resource Scarcity Decision
entities.context: Strategic inflection point framework for prioritizing when development resources are limited

entities.name: Feature Debate
entities.context: Previous mode of product decision-making focused on which features to build

entities.name: Dev Gas
entities.context: Metaphor for limited development capacity - every dollar/hour counts

entities.name: Funnel Data
entities.context: Analytics showing measurable user drop-off that triggers prioritization decisions

entities.name: UX Friction
entities.context: User experience issues causing conversion drop-off; prioritized over new features

entities.name: Product Roadmap
entities.context: Planning document impacted by resource scarcity decisions for immediate sprint

entities.name: Limited Runway
entities.context: Constraint acknowledging finite resources that forces prioritization and signals maturity

relationships.context: Represents strategic evolution from debating features to scarcity-driven prioritization
Measurable drop-off data triggers the shift to resource scarcity thinking
Fixing UX friction wins over building new features under this framework
Runway constraint forces prioritization and drives the decision framework
Decision directly changes product roadmap for immediate sprint
